notes: T2I three-part strings + video assembly hints per example_registry id. Used by scripts/onboarding/run_onboarding_proof_flux_and_video.py.

shared_negatives.book_cover_default: watermark, illegible tiny text, distorted title lettering, extra fingers, mangled hands, gore, medical gore, celebrity likeness, low resolution, jpeg artifacts
shared_negatives.manga_default: photoreal human skin pores, western superhero comic, chibi exaggeration, gore, sexualized minors, watermark, muddy inks
shared_negatives.editorial_default: stock photo cliché, smiling corporate handshake, gore, sensational tabloid, watermark, oversaturated HDR
shared_negatives.tool_ui_default: illegible microcopy, fake OS chrome, cluttered dashboard, dark pattern UI, watermark
shared_negatives.portrait_supporting: book cover layout, title typography, gore, sexualization, watermark, caricature exaggeration

t2i.foreground: Ebook cover illustration, exhausted founder silhouette at dim desk lamp, indigo and slate palette, generous negative space, empty title band, no readable words.
t2i.background: Atmospheric abstract gradient in cool slate blue and soft violet, soft blur, no hard edges.
t2i.lighting: Single warm desk pool against cool ambient fill, quiet mood, 2:3 portrait trim feel, highly detailed but soft.

video.prompt: 9:16 slow push-in on dim desk, indigo grain, ambient, no text.
